text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Trainer, see that? I got through<n>the whole
race. My lucky powers<n>went to work right away!
Sweet<n>victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It sure was! It was like a path of light<n>was guiding
me on the turf, saying,<n>"Come this way! Woof,
woof!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've made my debut... But that means<n>I'm only
just getting started, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then. Please do me the honor of<n>deciding the
next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...That's probably what you expected<n>me to say,
right? But why don't we<n>let divination do the work
for us?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I guess you could say<n>this is how I
like to spice things up.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here goes. Whatever it says on<n>the fortune
slip, that'll be my next<n>race. It's all up to luck
today!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Yayoi<n>Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Yayoi Sho! After running 2,000<n>meters through
the Nakayama spring<n>greenery, I'll emerge as a
beautiful<n>flower!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Spring<n>Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Stakes! Who will be first to<n>cover those
1,800 meters in<n>Nakayama and take the crown of
budding flowers?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the<n>Mainichi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Mainichi Hai! A 1,800-meter race<n>in Hanshin.
Since it's a G3 race, it<n>should be within reach. This
is a<n>chance to put all that everyday hard<n>work to
the test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's go with that! Hehehe, I'm<n>starting to get all
pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's not arbitrary! We're not doing<n>this for show,
you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We are following the will of the godsto the letter. Besides, you're theone who pulled the slip!
